---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like -->

## Problem It Solves
<!-- Describe the problem or pain point this feature would solve -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- How you envision this feature working -->

## Alternative Solutions
<!-- Any alternative solutions or features you've considered -->

## Examples
<!-- If this feature exists in other games/apps, provide examples or links -->

## Implementation Details
<!-- Optional: Technical details, code snippets, or architecture ideas -->

## Testing Requirements
<!-- How should this feature be tested? What test cases are needed? -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Any other context, screenshots, or mockups -->

## Effort Estimate
<!-- Optional: Small / Medium / Large -->

## Would you like to implement this feature?
- [ ] Yes, I'd like to work on this
- [ ] No, just suggesting
- [ ] Need help getting started
